data.name: 異次元屋敷怪異錄
data.detailed_description:
Sae, a university student, finds herself lost in the mountains.

Before long, she comes across an old looking mansion.

Hoping to find some help, she begins to explore it.

However, she eventually realizes that this isn't just any old mansion.

But it might be too late!

Will she be able to escape the mansion?

Find out in this Puzzle-Escape RPG!

Features

  • A Puzzle-Escape RPG Experience!

  • Collect Items as you Explore the Mansion

  • Solve Puzzles to Progress through the Mansion

  • Amazing Pixel Art

  • And No Grinding Required!
data.about_the_game:
Sae, a university student, finds herself lost in the mountains.

Before long, she comes across an old looking mansion.

Hoping to find some help, she begins to explore it.

However, she eventually realizes that this isn't just any old mansion.

But it might be too late!

Will she be able to escape the mansion?

Find out in this Puzzle-Escape RPG!

Features

  • A Puzzle-Escape RPG Experience!

  • Collect Items as you Explore the Mansion

  • Solve Puzzles to Progress through the Mansion

  • Amazing Pixel Art

  • And No Grinding Required!
data.short_description: A university student named Sae finds herself lost in the mountains. While searching for help, she comes across an old looking mansion and decides to enter it. However, there was more to this mansion than meets the eye. What will become of Sae? Find out in this Puzzle-Escape RPG!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

Minimum:

  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
